channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Amazon’s new AI-powered spotlight tech aims to help delivery drivers find packages faster
item.description: Amazon, in its quest for greater efficiency, has developed new systems to shave seconds off each package delivery and to help customers make faster buying choices, even for new product types that they may know little about.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Why it’s important to support fintechs in the acceleration age
item.description: In a time where the digital world is shifting beneath our feet, the speed of technological change can feel like it has never been greater. Tech advancements achieve widespread adoption seemingly at breakneck speeds.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Colella, Fast Company

item.title: Twins born conjoined celebrate 1st birthday after separation surgery
item.description: Twin brothers who were born conjoined recently celebrated their first birthday after undergoing successful separation surgery.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The Future of AI-Infused Writing: OpenAI's ChatGPT 4o with Canvas and Google's NotebookLM
item.description: OpenAI's ChatGPT 4o with Canvas and Google's NotebookLM are changing the game for writers. But will they reach maturity and stick around?
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Big shift in IT employment shows new skills are needed
item.description: Multiple research firms reported that the unemployment rate for IT workers dropped precipitously last month — in one instance, by nearly 37% — a decline that marked a serious shift from months of incremental increases mixed with plateaus in unemployment.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: A new way to ensure government and industry have enough cybersecurity people
item.description: "We could view cybersecurity as an entry level problem, but it is probably more of an intermediate and advanced role problem," Keith Clement said. The post A new way to ensure government and industry have enough cybersecurity people first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: American Water cyberattack renews focus on protecting critical infrastructure
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — A cyberattack continues to affect the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, renewing a focus on the importance of protecting critical infrastructure sites.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Harris backers praise Lina Khan at tech-focused fundraiser
item.description: Some Vice President Harris backers praised Federal Trade Commission (FTC) Chair Lina Khan at a tech-focused San Francisco fundraiser on Saturday headlined by former Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: States sue TikTok, alleging platform is addictive, harms kids' mental health
item.description: More than a dozen states and the District of Columbia sued TikTok on Tuesday, alleging the platform exploits and harms young users while "deceiving" the public about these dangers.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Databricks says with its new Databricks Apps platform, you can build tailored enterprise apps in 5 minutes
item.description: Every enterprise today is looking to get as much as possible out of its data and AI investments. But when building in-house apps, developers can struggle with infrastructure constraints and maintenance, security, data governance, compliance, and other issues.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: SAP Build gains AI capabilities to help build autonomous agents
item.description: SAP wants developers to view its Build platform as the one extension solution for all of SAP’s applications, according to Michael Aneling, chief product officer for SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: American Water, largest water utility in US, dealing with cyberattack
item.description: The largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States announced Monday that it was the victim of a cyberattack, prompting the firm to pause billing to customers.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Advocacy groups suspend use of 'suicide capsule' pending Swiss criminal probe of woman's death
item.description: Advocacy groups behind a so-called suicide capsule said Sunday they have suspended the process of taking applications to use it — which numbered over 370 last month — as a criminal investigation into its first use in Switzerland is completed.
item.dc:creator: JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AirPods 4 vs Pro 2: Is the newer model worth it?
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson compares the AirPods 4 and the AirPods Pro 2. "For me, audio quality is the most essential factor in buying new headphones or earbuds," Kurt says.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 10 tech tips and tricks everyone should know
item.description: There are a handful of ways you can make your tech experience less annoying, including through fixing autocorrect, turning off certain notifications and by creating folders on your iPhone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google ships Gemini 1.5 Flash-8B AI model
item.description: Google’s Gemini 1.5 Flash-8B AI model is now production-ready. The company said the stable release of Gemini 1.5 Flash-8B has the lowest cost per intelligence of any Gemini model. Availability was announced October 3.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Civilization 7 makers work with Shawnee to bring sincere representation of the tribe to the game
item.description: MIAMI, Okla. (AP) — Shawnee Tribe Chief Ben Barnes grew up playing video games, including “probably hundreds of hours” colonizing a distant planet in the 1999 title Sid Meier's Alpha Centauri.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM LEE BREWER and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Google says it will stop linking to New Zealand news if a law passes forcing it to pay for content
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — Google said Friday it will stop linking to New Zealand news content and will reverse its support of local media outlets if the government passes a law forcing tech companies to pay for articles displayed on their platforms.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World
